data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ - capture-review-diff.sh in plugins/dso/scripts/, uses HEAD-anchored algorithm. merge-state.sh has ms_get_worktree_only_files_from_head (HEAD-anchored) and ms_get_merge_base.
